metrics.total_reward: Sum of environment rewards collected in the episode.
metrics.mean_loss: Mean temporal-difference loss from Q-learning updates.
metrics.max_loss: Largest temporal-difference loss seen in the episode.
metrics.steps: Number of environment steps executed before termination or timeout.
metrics.recovered: 1 when the final mission_status is recovered, else 0.
metrics.lost: 1 when the final mission_status is lost, else 0.
metrics.final_status: Final mission_status reported by the environment.
metrics.final_battery_pct: Battery state of charge at the end of the episode.
metrics.final_attitude_error: Sun-sensor pointing error at the end of the episode.
metrics.final_fuel_units: Remaining thruster fuel at the end of the episode.
metrics.invalid_action_count: Count of actions producing error/refused results.
metrics.diagnostic_action_count: Count of diagnostic-style actions used in the episode.

graphs.plots/reward_curve.svg: Episode total reward with trailing 20-episode average.
graphs.plots/loss_curve.svg: Mean TD loss with trailing 20-episode average.
